_meta.description: The schedule is the single source of truth for what runs when. 'weekly' is the default Mon–Sun pattern (template IDs). 'anchorDate' is the Monday of plan week 1. 'overrides' let you swap a specific date's template (e.g. vacation, rest swap) without touching the weekly pattern. 'shift' pushes the whole plan forward by N days (e.g. after a break).

dayFocus.Mon: Bridges, clamshells, bird-dogs. Slow and controlled — form is the whole assignment.
dayFocus.Tue: Cardio day. Right glute on every climb.
dayFocus.Wed: Posture reset. Scapula work: pain-free range only.
dayFocus.Thu: Hold each pose. Breathe into it. Props are not optional.
dayFocus.Fri: Mind-muscle Friday. Pause at the top. Feel it fire.
dayFocus.Sat: Last ride of the week. Finish the data set.
dayFocus.Sun: Rest is training. Open ritual still counts.
